task_completion.description: Extract Channel 2 (Green/Cytoskeleton) from the FluorescentCells image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ/Fiji interface showing the 'Split Channels' command being used or a window specifically displaying only Channel 2 of the FluorescentCells image.

task_completion.description: Apply background subtraction with a rolling ball radius of 30 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subtract Background' dialog box open in ImageJ with the 'Rolling ball radius' set to 30 pixels.

task_completion.description: Apply contrast enhancement with 0.3% saturated pixels and normalization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enhance Contrast' dialog box open in ImageJ with 'Saturated pixels' set to 0.3% and the 'Normalize' checkbox ticked.

task_completion.description: Generate and save a standard Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ZProject' dialog showing 'Max Intensity' selected, and a save dialog or terminal command saving the result to '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/standard_mip.png'.

task_completion.description: Generate and save a depth color-coded RGB projection using the 'Spectrum' LUT with a calibration bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Usage of a depth/temporal color coding plugin with 'Spectrum' selected, a visible calibration bar on the resulting image, and saving it to '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/depth_coded_projection.png'.

task_completion.description: Save a text report listing the original number of channels, Z-slices, and LUT name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation of '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/stack_report.txt' containing the values: 3 channels, 1 Z-slice, and 'Spectrum' LUT.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ/Fiji GUI to perform the image processing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ImageJ/Fiji application open with menus, dialogs, and image windows being actively used, rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent processed the actual FluorescentCells image rather than a blank or dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image windows in Fiji should display actual biological cell structures (fluorescent microscopy data), proving the agent successfully loaded the real image despite the setup script creating an empty file.

integrity.description: The agent inspected the image properties to write the report rather than guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should open the 'Properties' or 'Show Info' window in ImageJ to check the actual dimensions (channels, slices) before writing the text report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target image 'FluorescentCells.tif' actually has 3 channels and only 1 Z-slice (despite the task description implying it is a Z-stack). The target channel to extract is Channel 2. The standard MIP must be saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/standard_mip.png'. The depth color-coded projection must use the 'Spectrum' LUT, include a calibration bar, and be saved to '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/depth_coded_projection.png'. The text report at '~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/stack_report.txt' should correctly state 3 channels, 1 Z-slice, and the 'Spectrum' LUT.
